design_philosophy: Quiet Luxury. High-contrast, stripped-down visuals that prioritize data clarity. A cinematic, moody aesthetic that signals trust and exclusivity for HNW/UHNW clientele.

rules: Headings must use Playfair Display for a boutique, premium feel.
Body text and data tables must use Manrope for crisp legibility.
Overlines MUST be uppercase, text-xs, with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).

spacing_and_layout.borders: Flat solid surfaces with 1px subtle borders (border-zinc-800). No heavy shadows.

lead_card.layout: Horizontal flex/grid container. Grid Mode B.
lead_card.style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
lead_card.avatar: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-md) avatar, NOT fully circular.
lead_card.badges: Thin borders (border-amber-500/30), small text (text-xs), padding (px-2 py-1).

wizard_modal.container: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 shadow-2xl rounded-xl max-w-4xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar
wizard_modal.header: Sticky top, bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-zinc-800 p-8.
wizard_modal.progress_indicator: Text-based overline (e.g. '01 / 03 • VERIFICAÇÃO') + thin 1px gold progress bar.

forms.inputs: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-md p-3 text-zinc-100 focus:outline-none focus:border-amber-500/50

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-zinc-950 font-medium px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-amber-400 hover:text-zinc-950 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 px-6 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white transition-colors

lead_listing_page.header: Title 'OTC Leads' (Playfair Display, text-3xl). 'New Lead' primary button.
lead_listing_page.filters: Search bar, Status dropdown, Tier dropdown.
lead_listing_page.list: Vertical stack of horizontal Lead Cards.

wizard_step_1_verificacao.title: Verificação de Entidade
elements: Search Input (Entity Name or Tax ID)
Result Card (if found): KYC Status, Trading Limits, Compliance Checklist
New Lead Form (if not found): Entity Name, Country, Source, Tier, Contact Info

wizard_step_2_pre_qualificacao.title: Pré-Qualificação
elements: Client Type Select: Retalho, HNWI, Empresa, Fundo

wizard_step_3_setup_operacional.title: Setup Operacional
elements: Settlement Method Toggle: SEPA, SWIFT, PIX, Crypto

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='new-lead-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement using .js files (no TypeScript). Strictly follow the dark/gold luxury theme. Ensure Shadcn UI elements are heavily customized to fit this boutique brand feel (no standard blue focus rings). Ensure all requested fields for the 3 steps are present in the code. Create the required flow in App.js or modularize it.
